phases.title: Phase 7 – Repository Chunking Engine
phases.description: Implement language‑aware and AST‑aware chunking, metadata enrichment, and deduplication.
acceptance: CLI creates a GitHub issue titled "Phase 7 – Repository Chunking Engine"
Issue body contains detailed description and acceptance criteria

phases.title: Phase 8 – Repository Intelligence Graph
phases.description: Build a dependency graph for the repository using NetworkX.

phases.title: Phase 9 – Architecture Discovery Engine
phases.description: Detect architectural layers (controllers, services, etc.) and expose via API.
acceptance: Architecture map returned in analysis response

phases.title: Phase 10 – AI Repository Chat
phases.description: Add conversation memory and history endpoints.

phases.title: Phase 12 – Security Vulnerability Detection
phases.description: OWASP scanner and LLM security analysis.

phases.title: Phase 14 – Code Smell Detection Platform
phases.description: Detect duplicate code, dead code, and anti‑patterns.

phases.title: Phase 16 – AI README Intelligence Generator
phases.description: Generate README with architecture and API docs.

phases.title: Phase 17 – Pull Request Intelligence Layer
phases.description: Impact analysis and risk scoring for PRs.

phases.title: Phase 18 – GitHub Action Review Bot 2.0
phases.description: Enhanced comment templates for security and performance.

phases.title: Phase 19 – Repository Health Dashboard
phases.description: Add debt, security, and quality charts.

phases.title: Phase 21 – Developer Productivity Intelligence
phases.description: GitHub metrics integration and productivity panel.

phases.title: Phase 22 – VS Code Extension Core
phases.description: Core VS Code extension with commands.

phases.title: Phase 23 – VS Code AI Assistant
phases.description: Inline AI suggestions via code lens.

phases.title: Phase 24 – Enterprise Governance Layer
phases.description: RBAC, audit logs, and policy enforcement.

phases.title: Phase 25 – RepoSage Enterprise Platform
phases.description: Full enterprise dashboard integrating all phases.
